    requires

name: allocate_idempotent

    requires

name: marshal_roundtrip_preserves_kind_field
code:
proof fn phi_5_marshal_roundtrip_preserves_kind_field<T: ResourceView>(obj: DynamicObjectView)
    requires
        obj.kind == T::kind(),
        T::unmarshal_spec(obj.spec) is Ok,
        T::unmarshal_status(obj.status) is Ok,
    ensures
        T::unmarshal(obj)->Ok_0.marshal().spec == obj.spec,
{
}
reason: marshal_spec is uninterpreted so marshal(unmarshal(obj)).spec = marshal_spec(unmarshal_spec(obj.spec)) which need not equal obj.spec — only the reverse roundtrip (unmarshal∘marshal = id) is guaranteed
